p1.purpose: Planning opportunity discovery and deterministic scoring
p1.notes: Not present in this repository. Source location and deployment must be verified in Week 1.

p1.name: UltAi
p1.purpose: Intake, workflow orchestration, lead management, routing and task management
resolvedBlockers: Build was broken (node_modules absent) — resolved
Test runner was absent — resolved via npm install
Competing CI/CD pipelines (pnpm/npm conflict) — deploy-vaultline.yml fixed to npm
ClerkOS schema had no drizzle-kit path — drizzle.clerkos.config.ts added
Admin endpoints unprotected — X-ADMIN-KEY middleware added
Marketing pages not routed in App.tsx — all 10 missing pages now routed
CI/CD workflows used secrets in if conditions (GitHub Actions rejects) — preflight job pattern applied to all three workflow files
End-to-end workflow proof test added — server/workflow-proof.test.ts proves PIE→UltAi→FineGuard→VaultLine chain for Bromley ref 24/AP/1234
Database driver confirmed — @neondatabase/serverless v1.1.0 with Neon URL auto-detection and ws WebSocket polyfill
UNIQUE constraint migration added — drizzle/0002_source_ref_unique.sql enforces idempotency on intake_forms.source_ref
remainingBlockers: Canonical deployment URL unverified — Vercel project not yet created
DATABASE_URL and DIRECT_URL not provisioned — Neon project not yet created
10-state workflow lifecycle not implemented (core-workflow package pending)
p1.notes: ClerkOS engine provides 4-state case lifecycle. Needs extension to 10-state target lifecycle via packages/core-workflow. Neon is confirmed database driver — isNeonUrl() detects neon.tech hostname.

p1.name: FineGuard
p1.purpose: Companies House monitoring, alerts, risk scoring and compliance management
p1.successMetric: Companies monitored, alerts delivered, paying customers
resolvedBlockers: FineGuard and ComplianceBundle pages are now routed at /fineguard and /compliance-bundle
Admin endpoints (/api/admin/compliance-bundles, /api/admin/contacts) now protected by X-ADMIN-KEY
Auto-activation rules proven deterministic — evaluateFineGuardActivation() pure function unit-tested
PIE→FineGuard bridge proven — activateFineGuardForPie() tested via server/workflow-proof.test.ts
Bromley ref 24/AP/1234 confirmed to trigger activate=true (pieOriginated + highUrgency + highValue all true)
remainingBlockers: No external cron trigger for scheduler endpoint — GET /api/internal/run-compliance-check exists but not wired to any schedule
Stripe keys must be provisioned in production environment
CH API key must be provisioned in production environment — auto-activation path does not require it; on-demand POST /api/compliance-bundle does
p1.notes: CH API integration is functional on-demand. Stripe checkout and webhook handler are implemented. Auto-activation via PIE path is fully proven without CH API. Critical gap: no scheduled monitoring loop and no email delivery mechanism.

p1.name: VaultLine
p1.purpose: Immutable audit trail and event retention
resolvedBlockers: VaultLine landing page now routed at /vaultline
Azure SQL Server replaced with Azure Database for PostgreSQL in deploy/main.bicep — technology now matches application postgres driver
PostgreSQL connection string now generated and stored in Key Vault as database-url secret
clerk_audit_events schema verified correct — entityUuid (uuid), correlationId (uuid), metadata (text/JSON), entityType (varchar 64)
writeAuditEvent() proven to emit 3 events for Bromley simulation: captured, fineguard_activation_evaluated, fineguard_activation_triggered
Migration scripts ready — npm run db:bootstrap runs ClerkOS + brand-suite migrations + system tenant seed in correct order
Neon confirmed as target database — @neondatabase/serverless v1.1.0 installed, driver auto-detection implemented
remainingBlockers: Azure resource provisioning status unverified — Bicep not confirmed deployed
Live DATABASE_URL not yet provisioned — Neon project not created; db:bootstrap blocked on missing credentials
failBundle Azure Function implementation not confirmed
System tenant row not yet seeded in any live environment — required for audit FK constraint
p1.notes: Audit event table schema is correct and verified. Three-event VaultLine chain proven via server/workflow-proof.test.ts. Migration path confirmed. Neon is the confirmed runtime database. Live bootstrap blocked on missing Neon credentials — next action is Neon + Vercel project creation.
